permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to invoke MCP tools (hf_jobs, hf_whoami, hf_doc_fetch, hf_doc_search) to submit training jobs, inspect job status, and fetch documentation. Allow this MCP call?
This skill needs to invoke registered tools such as hf_jobs, hf_whoami, dataset_search, and hub_repo_details. Allow this tool invocation?
This skill calls Hugging Face Jobs API, Hub API, and Trackio endpoints to submit training jobs, push models, and monitor runs. Allow this external API call?
This skill fetches content from external URLs including TRL documentation, GitHub raw scripts, Hugging Face Hub files, and Gist URLs. Allow this web fetch?
This skill submits training job payloads and model pushes to Hugging Face Jobs and Hub endpoints. Allow this web POST request?
This skill requires outbound network access to reach Hugging Face infrastructure, GitHub, and Trackio services. Allow outbound network access?
This skill may run local shell commands such as pip install, huggingface-cli, hf jobs, uv run, and python scripts. Allow shell execution?
This skill installs Python packages (trl, peft, trackio, trl-jobs, and others) via pip or uv. Allow package installation?
This skill reads the HF_TOKEN secret to authenticate with Hugging Face Hub for pushing trained models. Allow reading this secret?
This skill reads environment variables such as HF_TOKEN, ADAPTER_MODEL, BASE_MODEL, and OUTPUT_REPO passed to training jobs. Allow reading environment variables?
This skill sets environment variables (e.g. ADAPTER_MODEL, BASE_MODEL, OUTPUT_REPO) in job configurations. Allow writing environment variables?
This skill reads local files such as requirements.txt, example training scripts, and reference documents from the skill workspace. Allow reading local files?
This skill may write training scripts or other files locally if the user explicitly requests saving them. Allow writing local files?
This skill reads training script source code templates (SFT, DPO, GRPO) from the skill's scripts directory. Allow reading source code files?
This skill loads reference documents, training patterns, hardware guides, and troubleshooting guides from within the skill package as context. Allow loading this context?
This skill dispatches authored skill resources including reference files and example scripts. Allow loading the skill resources?
This skill submits autonomous training jobs to Hugging Face Jobs infrastructure that run independently for hours without further supervision. Allow delegating this autonomous job?
This skill pushes trained model weights and checkpoints to Hugging Face Hub repositories using HF_TOKEN. Allow pushing to the remote Hub?
This skill launches isolated Docker container workloads on Hugging Face Jobs GPU infrastructure to execute training scripts. Allow running containers?
This skill inspects running job containers on Hugging Face infrastructure to retrieve logs and status. Allow querying container state?
This skill may cancel running job containers on Hugging Face infrastructure. Allow managing container lifecycle?
